name: kinto
tagline: A lightweight JSON storage service for syncing data across devices
description: Kinto is a lightweight JSON storage service for syncing data across devices. It supports collections, permissions and versioning, and exposes a REST API and simple admin UI, often used for small self hosted sync or configuration backends.

features.title: Data Storage Service
features.description: Store and sync structured data collections

features.title: REST API
features.description: Access and modify data through HTTP APIs

features.title: Synchronization
features.description: Sync data across devices and clients

features.title: Self-Hosted Backend
features.description: Run the service on your own infrastructure
